subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined our hearts through His glorious Book and our breasts through His tender praise, as though I had gathered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور قلوبنا بکتابک الشریف و صدورنا بثنائک اللطیف کانی اجتنیت
